definitions: Actions, once performed, have permanent consequences and cannot be reversed or taken back.
The past cannot be changed; one must live with the results of their actions.
examples: She regretted her hasty decision, but deeds done cannot be undone.
He learned the hard way that deeds done cannot be undone after his business failed.
The old saying 'deeds done cannot be undone' truly applies to historical events.
synonyms: no use crying over spilt milk
